List and table regression

This fixture exercises both an unordered list and a small data table, mirroring reader-mode issues 1212 and 1213 where structural elements were flattened during extraction. The surrounding prose keeps readability above its minimum content threshold so the structure has a chance to survive.

  • Alpha item one
  • Bravo item two
  • Charlie item three

Following the list, a compact two-by-two table representing rows and columns that must reach the Markdown output as a real table, not flattened into paragraph text.

HeaderOneHeaderTwo
CellOneACellOneB
CellTwoACellTwoB

A closing paragraph to ensure the article body remains comfortably above the readability prune threshold and to provide context after the structured elements.
